overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic video game (Red Dead Redemption 2) showing a cowboy character walking through a dense foggy grassland at dawn. The character approaches and passes a white animal and abandoned wooden farm buildings in a moody, atmospheric rural setting with tall grass and scattered trees barely visible through the mist.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy grassland meadow with scattered trees

events.description: white animal becomes visible standing in the tall grass ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through tall grass in foggy meadow toward distant trees barely visible through the mist

notable_agents.action: white dog or sheep standing still in the grass, facing away from the character

entered.detail: tall trees barely visible through dense fog, silhouetted against the white mist
decaying wooden log lying horizontally in the tall grass

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy grassland at dawn, with the camera following a cowboy character walking through dense tall grass. Trees loom faintly in the fog ahead while a fallen log rests on the right. A white animal stands visible in the distance as the character approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy meadow approaching abandoned farm structures

events.description: abandoned wooden farm buildings emerge from the fog on the right side

agents.ego_description: continuing through the grass, approaching and passing the white animal on the right side while heading toward the abandoned structures

notable_agents.action: white animal standing in the grass, watching as the character passes by on the left

entered.detail: weathered two-story wooden house with broken windows and faded paint
small dilapidated outbuilding with a sloped roof behind the main house

segments.scene_description: As the character walks deeper into the fog, the white animal is passed on the right. Abandoned wooden farm buildings suddenly emerge from the mist ahead, revealing a weathered farmhouse and shed. The trees that were ahead now appear to the left as the character's path curves slightly.

scene_state.functional_zone: open foggy grassland passing abandoned structures

events.description: character walks past the abandoned farmhouse, leaving the structures behind

agents.ego_description: walking past the abandoned buildings and continuing straight into the open foggy field beyond

segments.scene_description: The character passes the abandoned wooden farmhouse and shed on the right, leaving them behind in the fog. The scene opens back up into an empty grassland with only distant trees visible through the mist as the character continues walking forward into the white void.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense, foggy grassland at dawn that briefly reveals a derelict homestead before fading back into a white void. It begins with the camera trailing a cowboy walking through tall grass, where faint trees loom ahead and a white animal stands visible in the distance. As the character advances, the animal is passed on the right and the mist parts to reveal a weathered farmhouse and shed emerging from the haze. The path then curves slightly, shifting the trees to the left as the character passes the abandoned wooden buildings. Finally, the scene opens back up into an empty expanse of grassland, with the structures receding into the fog as the character continues walking forward into the enveloping mist.
